历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 13081 → 12254 → 12825 → 15739. In the past three years, the overall trend has been backward, with 2025 moving back about 2914 places compared to 2024, showing significant fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15739. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's science (physics category) was 86 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 98 in 2024, 103 in 2025, and 111 in 2026, an increase of 8 students (about 7.8%) compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, theoretically causing the admission ranking to move backward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 2021: 56th → 2022: 57th → 2023: 62nd → 2024: 57th → 2025: 56th → 2026: 51st. In recent years, the ranking has steadily improved, rising to 51st in 2026, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but the 2026 reputation file does not include this university, and overall public opinion is stable. Douyin heat total ranking: 21st (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, application attention is average. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly popular/recommended in society, highly matching the university's enrollment majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Sichuan is 535,000. Estimated based on the 2025 physics category proportion of about 61.5%, physics category examinees are about 329,000, a significant increase from 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for 2026 is missing. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, which is cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a small proportion (about 100+ students), so regional preference has limited impact on Sichuan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15739, the 2026 expansion of 7.8% (causing the ranking to move back about 733 places), and the significant increase in local physics category examinees (intensifying competition), the expansion effect and the increase in examinees offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16442, with a range of 15942–16942.
